name: Sun-Sational Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the graham cracker crumbs, sugar, and melted margarine. Press the mixture onto the bottom of a 9-inch spring-form pan.
2. Bake at 325 degrees F (165 degrees C) for 10 minutes.
3. In a large bowl, combine the cream cheese, sugar, flour, lemon juice, lemon peel, and vanilla. Mix until well blended.
4. Add three eggs, one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
5. Beat in the remaining egg white. Set aside the yolk to use for glazing.
6. Pour the mixture over the crust.
7. Bake at 325 degrees F (165 degrees C) for another 10 minutes.
8. Reduce the oven temperature to 250 degrees F (120 degrees C). Continue baking for an additional 30 minutes.
9. Remove the cake from the pan and cool before removing the rim of the pan.
10. In a saucepan, combine sugar and cornstarch. Stir in water and lemon juice until smooth.
11. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until clear and thickened.
12. Add a small amount of hot mixture to slightly beaten egg yolk.
13. Return to the hot mixture and cook for 3 minutes, stirring constantly.
14. Allow to cool slightly before spooning over the cheesecake.
15. Chill before serving.
